testcase.name: Authentication › should register a new user
testcase.system-out: Registration started Clicked: a[href="/register"] Clicked register link Filled register username: testuserph4pv Filled register email: testzn2x9@example.com Filled register password: password123 Clicked: span:has-text("Create account") Clicked create account button Assertion passed: Registration heading for testuserph4pv is visible. Registration successful for username: testuserph4pv

testcase.name: Authentication › should login with existing user
testcase.system-out: Login started for username: testuser (attempt 1) Filled username: testuser Filled password: password123 Clicked: span:has-text("Login") Clicked login button Assertion passed: Login heading for testuser is visible. Login successful for username: testuser Logout started Clicked: svg.fa-chevron-down Clicked dropdown Clicked: button.dropdown-item:has-text("Logout") Clicked logout button Logout successful, login button visible

testcase.name: Authentication › should show error for invalid login credentials
testcase.system-out: Clicked: span:has-text("Login") Login error message displayed: Wrong username or password.

testcase.name: Authentication › should show validation errors for invalid registration input
testcase.system-out: Clicked: a[href="/register"] Pressed Enter key Register username validation message: Please provide a username. Register email validation message: Please enter a valid email address. Register password validation message: Password must have at least 8 characters.

testcase.name: Authentication › should show error for existing username on registration
testcase.system-out: Clicked: a[href="/register"] Clicked: span:has-text("Create account") Register error message displayed: A user with this username already exists.

testcase.name: Teams CRUD › should create a team
testcase.system-out: Login started for username: testuser (attempt 1) Filled username: testuser Filled password: password123 Clicked: span:has-text("Login") Clicked login button Assertion passed: Login heading for testuser is visible. Login successful for username: testuser Clicked: a[href="/teams"] Navigated to Teams page Clicked: span:has-text("Create a team") Clicked create team button Filled input#teamName, input#teamtext with value: cricket Filled team name: cricket Clicked: span:has-text("Create") Clicked create button Toast message visible: Success Success toast asserted Clicked team list item: cricket Filled team description: A team for cricket lovers Clicked: span:has-text("Save") Clicked save button Toast message visible: Success Success toast asserted Team visible: cricket Team created: cricket Team visible: cricket Team "cricket" created and visible Logout started Clicked: svg.fa-chevron-down Clicked dropdown Clicked: button.dropdown-item:has-text("Logout") Clicked logout button Logout successful, login button visible

testcase.name: Teams CRUD › should read a team
testcase.system-out: Login started for username: testuser (attempt 1) Filled username: testuser Filled password: password123 Clicked: span:has-text("Login") Clicked login button Assertion passed: Login heading for testuser is visible. Login successful for username: testuser Clicked: a[href="/teams"] Navigated to Teams page Clicked: span:has-text("Create a team") Clicked create team button Filled input#teamName, input#teamtext with value: basketball Filled team name: basketball Clicked: span:has-text("Create") Clicked create button Toast message visible: Success Success toast asserted Clicked team list item: basketball Filled team description: Team for reading test Clicked: span:has-text("Save") Clicked save button Toast message visible: Success Success toast asserted Team visible: basketball Team created: basketball Clicked team list item: basketball Edit header visible for team: basketball Team "basketball" read successfully Logout started Clicked: svg.fa-chevron-down Clicked dropdown Clicked: button.dropdown-item:has-text("Logout") Clicked logout button Logout successful, login button visible

testcase.name: Teams CRUD › should update a team
testcase.system-out: Login started for username: testuser (attempt 1) Filled username: testuser Filled password: password123 Clicked: span:has-text("Login") Clicked login button Assertion passed: Login heading for testuser is visible. Login successful for username: testuser Clicked: a[href="/teams"] Navigated to Teams page Clicked: span:has-text("Create a team") Clicked create team button Filled input#teamName, input#teamtext with value: football Filled team name: football Clicked: span:has-text("Create") Clicked create button Toast message visible: Success Success toast asserted Clicked team list item: football Filled team description: Team for update test Clicked: span:has-text("Save") Clicked save button Toast message visible: Success Success toast asserted Team visible: football Team created: football Clicked team list item: football Edit header visible for team: football Filled input#teamName, input#teamtext with value: soccer Filled team name: soccer Clicked: span:has-text("Save") Clicked save button Toast message visible: Success Success toast asserted Clicked: a[href="/teams"] Navigated to Teams page Clicked team list item: soccer Edit header visible for team: soccer Team name updated from football to soccer Team visible: soccer Team updated from "football" to "soccer" Logout started Clicked: svg.fa-chevron-down Clicked dropdown Clicked: button.dropdown-item:has-text("Logout") Clicked logout button Logout successful, login button visible

testcase.name: Teams CRUD › should delete a team
testcase.system-out: Login started for username: testuser (attempt 1) Filled username: testuser Filled password: password123 Clicked: span:has-text("Login") Clicked login button Assertion passed: Login heading for testuser is visible. Login successful for username: testuser Clicked: a[href="/teams"] Navigated to Teams page Clicked: span:has-text("Create a team") Clicked create team button Filled input#teamName, input#teamtext with value: hockey Filled team name: hockey Clicked: span:has-text("Create") Clicked create button Toast message visible: Success Success toast asserted Clicked team list item: hockey Filled team description: Team for delete test Clicked: span:has-text("Save") Clicked save button Toast message visible: Success Success toast asserted Team visible: hockey Team created: hockey Clicked team list item: hockey Clicked: button.is-danger svg.fa-trash-can Clicked delete team button Clicked: span:has-text("Do it!") Clicked confirm delete button Toast message visible: Success Success toast asserted Team deleted: hockey Clicked: a[href="/teams"] Navigated to Teams page Team not visible: hockey Team "hockey" deleted successfully Logout started Clicked: svg.fa-chevron-down Clicked dropdown Clicked: button.dropdown-item:has-text("Logout") Clicked logout button Logout successful, login button visible

testcase.name: Teams CRUD › should show error for empty team name on create
testcase.system-out: Login started for username: testuser (attempt 1) Filled username: testuser Filled password: password123 Clicked: span:has-text("Login") Clicked login button Assertion passed: Login heading for testuser is visible. Login successful for username: testuser Clicked: a[href="/teams"] Navigated to Teams page Clicked: span:has-text("Create a team") Clicked create team button Filled input#teamName, input#teamtext with value: Filled team name: Create button is disabled Clicked: button.close Clicked close button Create button is disabled for empty team name Logout started Clicked: svg.fa-chevron-down Clicked dropdown Clicked: button.dropdown-item:has-text("Logout") Clicked logout button Logout successful, login button visible

testcase.name: Teams CRUD › should allow creating teams with duplicate names
testcase.system-out: Login started for username: testuser (attempt 1) Filled username: testuser Filled password: password123 Clicked: span:has-text("Login") Clicked login button Assertion passed: Login heading for testuser is visible. Login successful for username: testuser Clicked: a[href="/teams"] Navigated to Teams page Clicked: span:has-text("Create a team") Clicked create team button Filled input#teamName, input#teamtext with value: tennis Filled team name: tennis Clicked: span:has-text("Create") Clicked create button Toast message visible: Success Success toast asserted Clicked team list item: tennis Filled team description: First team Clicked: span:has-text("Save") Clicked save button Toast message visible: Success Success toast asserted Team visible: tennis Team created: tennis Team visible: tennis Clicked: a[href="/teams"] Navigated to Teams page Clicked: span:has-text("Create a team") Clicked create team button Filled input#teamName, input#teamtext with value: tennis Filled team name: tennis Clicked: span:has-text("Create") Clicked create button Toast message visible: Success Success toast asserted Clicked team list item: tennis Filled team description: Duplicate description Clicked: span:has-text("Save") Clicked save button Toast message visible: Success Success toast asserted Team visible: tennis Team created: tennis Clicked: a[href="/teams"] Navigated to Teams page Team "tennis" count in list: 4 (raw texts: ["cricket","basketball","soccer","tennis","tennis","cricket","basketball","soccer","tennis","tennis"]) Duplicate team names are allowed Logout started Clicked: svg.fa-chevron-down Clicked dropdown Clicked: button.dropdown-item:has-text("Logout") Clicked logout button Logout successful, login button visible
